title: Brotein Supabase tables — food_items + restaurants + protein_logs
html:
Supabase table-editor view of the Brotein backend — food_categories, food_items, profiles, protein_logs, restaurant_items, restaurants — with the food_items rows seeded for ONE Bar, Built Bar, KIND, RXBAR, thinkThin, Quest, Barebells. Sibling capture to the May 2 column-spec sketch and the May 19 restaurants seed.

brotein · supabase · anabolic scoring · bromenu data model
